title: fraxinus xanthoxyloides
intro: Fraxinus xanthoxyloides, also known as the yellow-wood ash, is a species of ash tree native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus xanthoxyloides include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-infective agent. Fraxinus xanthoxyloides is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional African herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
